pr.title: WIP: Depth Recurrence via Weight-Shared Transformer Blocks

output.summary: Weight-shared transformer recursion reuses a few blocks across iterations with layer-conditioned gating and recurrent skips on the PR#1019 stack.
techniques: Weight-shared transformer blocks iterated for >20 effective layers
Layer-index embeddings and learned gates for per-iteration conditioning
Per-iteration RMSNorm with adapted U-Net-style recurrence skips
